Strong foundation in DSA (150+ problems) and RESTful API design. Open to full-time Software Engineering roles starting 2026.

## Technical Skills

- **Databases:** MongoDB, MySQL, Realm DB

## Projects

### ApplyWise AI
RAG-ready resume customization assistant that tailors a candidate profile to any job description — match score, skill-gap analysis, ATS-optimized resume sections, cover letter, and interview questions. Integrates the DeepSeek LLM via an OpenAI-compatible API with a deterministic rule-based fallback and a fact-grounded chat panel.
**Stack:** React.js, Vite, FastAPI, Python, Pydantic, DeepSeek LLM API

### BiteGram
Real-time food-delivery platform connecting customers, restaurants, and delivery personnel — browsing, ordering, and live delivery tracking. Order/menu management, secure authentication, dual payments (COD & online), cloud-based media handling.
**Stack:** React.js, Tailwind, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Socket.io, Cloudinary, Razorpay, Leaflet

### MindMate
AI-powered mental-health platform with secure authentication, therapy conversations powered by Gemini, mood tracking, and interactive mindfulness features (breathing exercises, zen garden, forest walks).
**Stack:** Next.js, TypeScript, React, Tailwind, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Google Gemini AI

## Why Hire Updesh

- **Production-ready full-stack experience** — has shipped React + Node + FastAPI features for real internal-team applications (Power Grid scheduling system, BPAAS production code).
- **End-to-end ownership** — designs APIs, builds UIs, integrates services, deploys.
- **Modern AI exposure** — has integrated DeepSeek and Gemini LLMs into shipped products with safeguards against hallucination.

- **Team-ready** — has worked in Agile teams across 4 different companies, comfortable with code reviews, debugging, and cross-functional collaboration.
